title: Robots move in as waste firms struggle to find staff
summary: Waste management companies are turning to humanoid robots to address severe labor shortages in sorting operations. The automation reflects broader industry challenges in recruiting and retaining workers for physically demanding roles.
content: Humanoid robots are being added to the automation of waste sorting.

zh.title: 随着废物处理公司难以招聘员工，机器人开始接管
zh.summary: 废物处理公司正转向类人型机器人以应对分类作业中的严重劳动力短缺。这种自动化反映了该行业在招聘和留住体力劳动岗位员工方面面临的更广泛挑战。

title: Stock futures are little changed as Wall Street eyes latest developments in Middle East and oil prices: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures showed minimal movement as investors monitored unfolding Middle East developments and fluctuating oil prices. Tensions between the U.S. and Iran threaten to destabilize a fragile ceasefire and could impact global markets. Market participants are bracing for volatility as geopolitical risks remain elevated.
content: All three major averages slipped on Monday as tensions in the Middle East threatened the staying power of a tenuous ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran.

zh.title: 股市期货基本持平，华尔街关注中东局势和油价最新进展：实时更新
zh.summary: 美国股市期货变动不大，投资者密切关注中东局势发展和油价波动。美伊之间的紧张局势威胁脆弱停火的稳定性，可能冲击全球市场。市场参与者正为波动性做准备，因为地缘政治风险仍然居高不下。

title: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' kicks off summer movie season in style with $77 million opening
summary: Disney and 20th Century Studios' "The Devil Wears Prada 2" opened the 2026 summer blockbuster season with an impressive $77 million in domestic box office receipts. The strong debut demonstrates continued audience appetite for high-profile sequels and established franchises. The film's success sets a bullish tone for the summer movie slate.
content: Disney and 20th Century Studios' "The Devil Wears Prada 2" opened the summer movie season with $77 million in ticket sales.

zh.title: 《穿Prada的恶魔2》以7700万美元票房强势开启2026年暑期档
zh.summary: 迪士尼和20世纪工作室出品的《穿Prada的恶魔2》以7700万美元国内票房收入打开了2026年暑期大片季的序幕。这一强劲的首周成绩表明观众继续对高调续集和知名特许经营权感兴趣。该片的成功为整个暑期档奠定了积极的基调。

title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Major U.S. stock averages declined Monday as Middle East tensions pushed oil prices higher and spooked investors seeking safe havens. The Dow Industrials shed more than 550 points amid growing concerns about regional stability and energy prices. Tuesday's trading will likely hinge on new developments in geopolitics and continued oil market moves.
content: The major averages sold off on Monday, with the Dow Industrials losing more than 550 points as oil prices rose and investors grew worried about the Middle East.

zh.title: 周二股市头条：下一个交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 周一美国股市主要指数下跌，中东紧张局势推高油价并吓跑了寻求避险的投资者。道琼斯工业平均指数下跌超过550点，人们对地区稳定性和能源价格的担忧加剧。周二的交易可能将取决于地缘政治的新进展和油市的持续波动。

title: Amazon is taking on FedEx and UPS. That may not be so simple.
summary: Amazon is making an aggressive push into the logistics market, prompting declines in FedEx and UPS share prices. However, one analyst expressed skepticism about whether Amazon's new service will achieve the transformative impact some investors expect. The established logistics giants have deep operational expertise and infrastructure advantages that could limit Amazon's disruption.
content: FedEx and UPS shares are falling, but one analyst isn’t sure that Amazon’s new service will have a significantly disruptive effect.

zh.title: 亚马逊挑战联邦快递和美国联合包裹。这可能不那么简单。
zh.summary: 亚马逊正在积极进军物流市场，导致联邦快递和美国联合包裹的股价下跌。然而，一位分析师对亚马逊的新服务是否能实现投资者期望的变革性影响表示怀疑。这些成熟的物流巨头拥有深厚的运营专业知识和基础设施优势，可能会限制亚马逊的颠覆性影响。

title: Tesla just hit a ‘symbolic’ self-driving milestone. Real-world success will be tougher.
summary: Tesla reached a technical milestone that CEO Musk had previously identified as necessary to achieve safe, unsupervised autonomous driving. While symbolically significant, the achievement falls short of demonstrating full self-driving capability in real-world conditions. Tesla faces substantial regulatory, technical, and safety hurdles before autonomous vehicles can reach mainstream deployment.
content: Tesla has reached the threshold Musk once said would be required to achieve “safe unsupervised self-driving,” but the company still faces various hurdles.

zh.title: 特斯拉刚刚达到一个"象征性的"自动驾驶里程碑。现实世界的成功将更具挑战性。
zh.summary: 特斯拉达到了一个技术里程碑，首席执行官马斯克之前曾将其确定为实现安全、无监督自动驾驶所必需的。虽然在象征意义上很重要，但该成就还不足以证明在现实世界条件下的完整自动驾驶能力。特斯拉在自动驾驶汽车达到主流部署之前，面临实质性的监管、技术和安全障碍。

title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: China is rewiring the Silicon Valley model — starting in Hong Kong
summary: Hong Kong is experiencing a surge in initial public offerings as China's maturing tech ecosystem adapts the Silicon Valley venture capital model to its own market. The growth signals China's ambitions to build an indigenous innovation economy rivaling Western tech hubs. Hong Kong's emergence as a financial center for Chinese tech companies could reshape global capital flows.
content: Hong Kong's IPO surge looks to be just getting started, as China's tech boom sees its ecosystem mature.

zh.title: CNBC的《中国连接》通讯：中国正在重新布局硅谷模式——从香港开始
zh.summary: 香港正在经历首次公开募股的激增，因为中国日益成熟的科技生态系统正在将硅谷风险投资模式适应到自己的市场。这一增长表明中国有雄心建立一个与西方科技中心相匹敌的本土创新经济。香港作为中国科技公司金融中心的崛起可能会重塑全球资本流动。

title: Here’s just how quickly Micron has risen up the ranks of the top U.S companies
summary: Semiconductor manufacturer Micron has experienced a remarkable ascent, climbing from outside the top 100 U.S. companies just one year ago to a position of prominence. This rapid rise reflects surging demand for memory chips driven by AI infrastructure buildout and data center expansion. Micron's trajectory demonstrates the outsized value accruing to companies positioned in critical tech infrastructure.
content: At the start of last year, Micron wasn’t even among the top 100 U.S. companies. Its fortunes have changed dramatically since then.

zh.title: 美光如何迅速跻身美国顶级公司之列
zh.summary: 半导体制造商美光经历了显著的上升，在短短一年内从美国百强企业之外跻身到重要位置。这一快速增长反映了由人工智能基础设施建设和数据中心扩展驱动的存储芯片需求激增。美光的轨迹展示了位于关键技术基础设施中的公司所获得的巨大价值。

title: OpenAI sales leader leaves for role at Thrive Capital
summary: James Dyett, who joined OpenAI in 2023 during the ChatGPT-driven growth phase, is departing the AI company to assume a role at venture capital firm Thrive Capital. Dyett's departure represents notable executive movement at OpenAI, which has been navigating rapid scaling and competitive pressures. His transition to venture capital signals the growing investment interest in AI-driven opportunities.
content: James Dyett joined OpenAI in 2023, shortly after the company underwent a period of explosive growth with the launch of its ChatGPT chatbot.

zh.title: OpenAI销售主管离职加入Thrive Capital
zh.summary: 詹姆斯·戴特于2023年在ChatGPT推动的增长阶段加入OpenAI，现已离开这家人工智能公司，转而在风险投资公司Thrive Capital担任新职位。戴特的离职代表了OpenAI的重要高管变动，该公司一直在应对快速扩展和竞争压力。他向风险投资的转变反映了市场对人工智能驱动机会的投资兴趣日益增长。

title: Palantir tops estimates on 85% revenue growth, fastest expansion since market debut in 2020
summary: Palantir exceeded analyst expectations with record 85% revenue growth, its fastest expansion rate since the company's 2020 market debut. The explosive growth reflects surging demand from U.S. government agencies and expanding commercial adoption of its data analytics platform. Palantir's performance underscores the market's confidence in AI-powered intelligence and data processing capabilities.
content: Palantir reported better-than-expected revenue and profit, driven by growth in sales to U.S. government agencies.

zh.title: Palantir以85%收入增长超预期，创2020年上市以来最快扩张速度
zh.summary: Palantir以创纪录的85%收入增长超越分析师预期，这是该公司自2020年上市以来最快的扩张速度。这种强劲增长反映了美国政府机构的需求激增和其数据分析平台商业应用的扩大采用。Palantir的表现突出了市场对人工智能驱动的智能和数据处理能力的信心。

title: Pinterest surges 15% after earnings beat as company posts strong guidance
summary: Pinterest's stock jumped 15% following a better-than-expected earnings report and optimistic forward guidance. The company's restructuring—which included a 15% workforce reduction and reduced office footprint—is yielding results as it reallocates resources toward AI initiatives. Pinterest's success suggests investors are rewarding efficiency gains and strategic pivots toward high-growth technologies.
content: Pinterest cut nearly 15% of its workforce and reduced office space in January as it pushes more resources into AI.

zh.title: Pinterest在财报超预期和强劲前景指引后涨幅15%
zh.summary: Pinterest股票在好于预期的财报和乐观的前景指引后上涨15%。该公司的重组——包括15%的劳动力削减和办公空间缩小——在向人工智能计划重新分配资源时取得成效。Pinterest的成功表明投资者在奖励效率提升和向高增长技术的战略转向。

title: The silent crisis taxing your grocery bill could get a lot louder
summary: Fertilizer costs have reached 2026 highs as U.S. farmers reduce planting, raising concerns about potential food scarcity in coming seasons. Investors are positioning in agricultural stocks as a hedge against rising food prices and supply constraints. The "silent crisis" in farming economics could eventually translate into widespread impacts on consumer grocery bills.
content: As fertilizer costs hit 2026 highs and U.S. farmers cut planting, investors are looking to these stocks to hedge against food scarcity.

zh.title: 这场让你食品账单承压的无声危机可能会变得更加严重
zh.summary: 随着美国农民减少种植，肥料成本达到2026年高位，引发了对未来季节潜在粮食短缺的担忧。投资者正在农业股中布局，以对冲食品价格上升和供应约束。农业经济中的"无声危机"最终可能转化为对消费者食品账单的广泛影响。

title: Here’s what the growing gap between Americans with good and bad credit says about the economy
summary: The financial gap between super prime and subprime credit consumers has widened to exceed pre-pandemic (2019) levels, signaling a divergence in economic outcomes across income and credit spectrums. This expanding disparity reflects differing access to credit, employment stability, and wealth accumulation opportunities. The trend suggests growing economic inequality and potential financial stress among lower-income households despite broader economic growth narratives.
content: The gap in overall financial well-being between super prime and subprime has now “surpassed” 2019 levels.

zh.title: 美国优质和不良信用人群之间扩大的差距能说明什么关于经济的问题
zh.summary: 顶级和次级信用消费者之间的财务差距已扩大至超过疫情前(2019年)水平，表明经济成果在收入和信用范围内出现分化。这种扩大的差异反映了信用获取、就业稳定性和财富积累机会的不同。这一趋势表明经济不平等加剧，尽管经济增长叙事更广泛，但低收入家庭可能面临财务压力。

title: Iran attacks UAE; U.S. says it sank boats in Strait of Hormuz
summary: Iran's attack on UAE infrastructure violated an ongoing ceasefire and prompted US military response in the Strait of Hormuz, causing global markets to decline and oil prices to surge. The escalation threatens regional stability and global energy supplies.
content: Stock market indices fell, and oil prices rose after the reported attack on the United Arab Emirates by Iran, which came nearly a month into a ceasefire.

zh.title: 伊朗攻击阿联酋；美国称在霍尔木兹海峡击沉船只
zh.summary: 伊朗对阿联酋基础设施的攻击违反了正在进行的停火协议，引发了美国军方在霍尔木兹海峡的回应，导致全球市场下跌和油价飙升。这一升级威胁了地区稳定和全球能源供应。

title: Spirit Airlines CEO on carrier's collapse: 'We just kind of ran out of runway'
summary: Spirit Airlines ceased operations, ending its decades-long reign as America's most prominent budget airline after running out of financial runway. The closure marks a significant consolidation in the US discount carrier segment.
content: Spirit Airlines shut down before dawn on Saturday ending its run as the most famous U.S. discount airline.

zh.title: 美联精神航空首席执行官谈运营商倒闭："我们基本上用尽了跑道"
zh.summary: 美联精神航空公司停止运营，结束了其作为美国最著名廉价航空公司数十年的统治，因为它用尽了财务资源。这次关闭标志着美国折扣航空运营商领域的重要整合。

title: Musk texted OpenAI's Brockman about settlement two days before trial began
summary: Elon Musk contacted OpenAI President Greg Brockman about a settlement just days before trial proceedings began in his lawsuit against the company. The communication suggests potential settlement discussions in the ongoing dispute between the co-founder and the AI organization.
content: Elon Musk co-founded OpenAI in 2015 and sued the company, President Greg Brockman and CEO Sam Altman in 2024.

zh.title: 马斯克在审判开始前两天就与OpenAI的布罗克曼就和解事宜进行了文字沟通
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克在针对该公司的诉讼审判程序开始前几天联系了OpenAI总裁格雷格·布罗克曼，讨论和解事宜。这一沟通暗示在这位联合创始人和人工智能组织之间的持续争议中可能存在和解讨论。

title: Novo Nordisk’s Wegovy head start on pills forces investors to rethink Eli Lilly's GLP-1 dominance
summary: Early data from Novo Nordisk's Wegovy pill and Eli Lilly's Foundayo are reshaping investor sentiment about the competitive landscape for GLP-1 obesity medications. Novo Nordisk's first-mover advantage with its pill formulation is challenging assumptions about Eli Lilly's market dominance. This shift could reshape pharmaceutical valuations in the obesity treatment sector.
content: Early signs from the launch of Novo Nordisk's Wegovy pill and Eli Lilly & Co.'s Foundayo are making investors rethink the opportunity for GLP-1 pills.

zh.title: 诺和诺德Wegovy药丸领先地位迫使投资者重新评估礼来GLP-1的主导地位
zh.summary: 诺和诺德Wegovy药丸和礼来Foundayo的早期数据正在改变投资者对GLP-1肥胖症药物竞争格局的看法。诺和诺德在药丸制剂中的先发优势正在挑战关于礼来市场主导地位的假设。这一转变可能会重塑肥胖症治疗领域的制药估值。

title: ‘I always did the graveyard shift’: I worked for 54 years. Why on earth would I wait to claim Social Security at 70?
summary: A career worker questions the rationale for delaying Social Security claims until age 70 after 54 years of consistent employment, highlighting the disparity between expected work duration and benefit optimization. A federal budget committee has proposed capping Social Security benefits at $100,000 for married couples, potentially affecting retirement planning strategies. This reflects ongoing policy debate about Social Security's sustainability and optimal claiming ages.
content: The Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget published a paper suggesting capping Social Security at $100,000 for a married couple.

zh.title: '我总是上夜班':我工作了54年。我为什么要等到70岁才领取社会保障？
zh.summary: 一位职业工作者在54年的稳定工作后质疑延迟到70岁领取社会保障的合理性，突出了预期工作时间和福利优化之间的差异。联邦预算委员会提议将已婚夫妇的社会保障福利上限定为10万美元，这可能会影响退休规划策略。这反映了关于社会保障可持续性和最佳领取年龄的持续政策辩论。

title: What's behind Eli Lilly's down-and-up day after last week's post-earnings surge
summary: Eli Lilly's stock experienced a notable intraday reversal following its strong earnings report, reflecting shifting investor sentiment on biotech momentum. The down-and-up movement highlights market dynamics around earnings surprises and sector positioning heading into the market close. Understanding these daily patterns can inform trading decisions during critical market hours.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 上周财报发布后大幅上涨，礼来股票为何出现宽幅波动？
zh.summary: 礼来股票在强势财报后经历了显著的日内反转，反映了投资者对生物技术前景看法的转变。这种上下波动凸显了围绕财报惊喜和市场收盘前行业定位的市场动态。理解这些日常波动模式可以为关键市场时段的交易决策提供参考。

title: Ryan Cohen makes a longshot run at eBay. Analysts see little chance GameStop can pull it off
summary: Ryan Cohen is reportedly pursuing a takeover of eBay, though analysts view the prospect as unlikely given GameStop's financial constraints and operational challenges. An eBay shareholder expressed concern about potential market manipulation tactics if such an attempt materialized. The move represents a bold but risky diversification strategy for the struggling retailer.
content: One eBay owner said that it's "disconcerting to pump and dump, if that is how it plays out."

zh.title: 瑞恩·科恩对eBay发起收购尝试。分析师认为游戏驿站成功的机会很小
zh.summary: 据报道，瑞恩·科恩正在追求对eBay的收购，尽管分析师认为鉴于游戏驿站的财务限制和运营挑战，这种可能性很小。一名eBay股东表示担忧如果这样的尝试实现，可能会出现市场操纵战术。此举代表了这家困境中零售商的大胆但风险的多元化战略。

title: Berkshire shares trade lower even after Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
summary: Berkshire stock traded lower despite strong earnings growth and positive investor reception to CEO Greg Abel's leadership at the company's annual meeting. The disconnect between fundamental improvements and stock performance suggests underlying investor skepticism about capital allocation and future strategic direction. Abel faces pressure to demonstrate more proactive decision-making to regain market confidence.
content: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.

zh.title: 伯克希尔股票下跌，尽管艾贝尔在会议上得到好评、收益增长
zh.summary: 伯克希尔股票尽管收益增长强劲，且投资者对首席执行官格雷格·艾贝尔在公司年会上的领导力反应积极，但股价仍然下跌。基本面改善与股票表现之间的不匹配表明投资者对资本配置和未来战略方向存在潜在怀疑。艾贝尔面临压力，需要展示更主动的决策以重获市场信心。

title: Optics is the next big AI bottleneck. This company could be an underrated beneficiary.
summary: GlobalFoundries has introduced new technology to address optical infrastructure constraints in AI data centers, potentially solving a critical bottleneck limiting AI infrastructure scaling. Co-packaged optics are emerging as essential for efficient data center performance, positioning early innovators for significant competitive advantage. This represents a potentially overlooked opportunity in the AI supply chain hierarchy.
content: GlobalFoundries just introduced a new technology to boost the use of co-packaged optics in AI data centers.

zh.title: 光学是AI下一个主要瓶颈。这家公司可能是被低估的受益者
zh.summary: 格罗方德推出了新技术来解决AI数据中心中的光学基础设施限制，可能解决限制AI基础设施扩展的关键瓶颈。共封装光学正成为高效数据中心性能的必需品，为早期创新者提供了显著的竞争优势。这代表了AI供应链层级中可能被忽视的机会。

title: Trump attack defendant Cole Allen under harsher jail conditions than Jan. 6 defendants: judge
summary: Cole Allen, charged with attempting to assassinate President Trump at a White House event, is facing comparatively harsher jail conditions despite having less severe charges than some January 6 defendants. A judge has highlighted the disparity in detention standards across different presidential security threat cases. This raises questions about consistency in justice system treatment of security-related offenses.
content: Cole Allen is charged with trying to assassinate President Donald Trump at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner at the Washington Hilton Hotel.

zh.title: 特朗普遇袭案被告科尔·艾伦遭遇比1月6日被告更严厉的监禁条件：法官
zh.summary: 科尔·艾伦因试图在白宫活动上刺杀特朗普总统而被控，尽管其指控不如部分1月6日被告严重，但面临更严厉的监禁条件。一名法官强调了不同总统安全威胁案件中拘留标准的差异。这引发了关于司法系统对安全相关犯罪处理一致性的问题。

title: Berkshire analysts are still tepid on the stock after annual meeting. What Abel can do to win them over
summary: Analyst sentiment toward Berkshire remains cautious despite CEO Greg Abel's strong performance at the annual meeting and robust earnings growth. Analysts specifically cite disappointment with the company's capital allocation strategy, wanting a more aggressive share buyback stance. Abel faces pressure to deploy more forceful tactics to regain institutional investor enthusiasm.
content: "We think investors were hoping for a more aggressive buyback stance," said Catherine Seifert, analyst at CFRA.

zh.title: 伯克希尔分析师在年度会议后仍对股票持谨慎态度。阿贝尔如何才能赢得他们的支持
zh.summary: 尽管首席执行官格雷格·阿贝尔在年度会议上表现出色，公司盈利增长强劲，但伯克希尔的分析师情绪仍然谨慎。分析师特别对公司的资本配置策略表示失望，希望采取更积极的股票回购政策。阿贝尔面临压力，需要采取更有力的举措来重新获得机构投资者的热情。

title: ‘If all six have hantavirus, that’s very worrisome’: This is what we know about the cruise-ship outbreak
summary: A cruise ship faces a potential multi-case hantavirus outbreak, with particular concern about the Andes strain which can spread between passengers. Health experts warn that multiple confirmed cases would represent an unusual and significant public health threat on a contained vessel. The incident underscores vulnerabilities in cruise environments to rapid communicable disease spread.
content: A rare form of the hantavirus can be spread from person to person, raising concern that the current outbreak concerns the Andes virus.

zh.title: "如果六人都感染汉坦病毒，那太令人担忧了"：我们对邮轮疫情的了解
zh.summary: 一艘邮轮面临潜在的多例汉坦病毒疫情，令人特别担忧的是可在乘客间传播的安第斯毒株。卫生专家警告称，多个确诊病例将构成封闭邮轮环境中异常且严重的公共卫生威胁。该事件突出了邮轮环境对快速传染病传播的脆弱性。

title: UPS, FedEx stocks sink after Amazon expands logistics network to other businesses
summary: UPS and FedEx stock prices collapsed after Amazon announced it would open its supply chain logistics network to external companies, intensifying competition. Amazon's move marks a strategic shift toward becoming a major logistics competitor rather than just a customer of traditional carriers. This threatens the long-standing duopoly these carriers have maintained in package delivery.
content: UPS and FedEx stocks sank Monday after Amazon announced it was opening up its supply chain network to outside companies.

zh.title: UPS、FedEx股价下跌，亚马逊向其他企业扩展物流网络
zh.summary: 在亚马逊宣布向外部公司开放其供应链物流网络后，UPS和FedEx股价暴跌，加剧了市场竞争。亚马逊的举动标志着战略转变，从传统承运商的客户转变为主要物流竞争对手。这威胁到这些承运商在包裹递送中长期维持的双寡头垄断地位。

title: Software stocks are turning around. The group could be a new leader in tech, says Katie Stockton
summary: Software stocks are showing renewed momentum with technical indicators suggesting they could outperform the broader S&P 500 market. Analyst Katie Stockton identifies improving relative strength signals as evidence of a potential sector leadership transition within technology. This suggests software companies may become the driving force behind tech sector gains.
content: The improved momentum behind software stocks and relative 'buy' signals versus the S&P 500 suggest software stocks are asserting themselves.

zh.title: 软件股票势头回升，分析师Katie Stockton称其可能成为科技新领导者
zh.summary: 软件股票显示出新的势头，技术指标表明它们可能会超越更广泛的标普500市场表现。分析师Katie Stockton将改善的相对强度信号确定为科技行业潜在领导力过渡的证据。这表明软件公司可能成为科技行业增长的驱动力。

title: Gap co‑founder Doris Fisher dies at 94
summary: Doris Fisher, co-founder of The Gap and the person who coined its name, has passed away at age 94 after co-founding the iconic retailer with her husband Donald in 1969. Her entrepreneurial vision transformed casual fashion retail and created one of America's most recognizable clothing brands. Fisher's legacy extends beyond business to broader impacts on American retail and fashion culture.
content: Fisher and her late husband Donald Fisher opened the first Gap store in 1969 on Ocean Avenue in San Francisco. She coined the name "The Gap."

zh.title: Gap创始人Doris Fisher去世，享年94岁
zh.summary: Gap创始人、为其取名的Doris Fisher去世，享年94岁，她与丈夫Donald于1969年共同创办了这一标志性零售商。她的创业愿景改变了休闲时尚零售业，创造了美国最知名的服装品牌之一。Fisher的遗产超越了商业范围，对美国零售和时尚文化产生了深远影响。

title: Circle jumps 20% on Clarity Act compromise that preserves stablecoin rewards
summary: Circle's stock surged 20% following a congressional compromise on the CLARITY market structure bill that preserves stablecoin reward programs. The legislative agreement removes a major regulatory threat that had previously jeopardized stablecoin utility and wider adoption. This is a significant regulatory victory for the cryptocurrency stablecoin ecosystem.
content: Lawmakers over the weekend reached a compromise on the market structure bill known as the CLARITY Act that keeps stablecoin reward programs intact.

zh.title: Circle因保留稳定币奖励的《清晰法》妥协而上涨20%
zh.summary: 在国会就保留稳定币奖励计划的《清晰法》市场结构法案达成妥协后，Circle股价飙升20%。这项立法协议消除了之前危害稳定币实用性和更广泛采用的重大监管威胁。这是加密货币稳定币生态的重大监管胜利。

title: Thinking of raiding your 401(k) for a hardship withdrawal? Ask these questions first.
summary: Financial advisors counsel prospective 401(k) raiders to carefully evaluate whether hardship withdrawals represent genuine financial necessity or emotional reaction to hardship. Strategic decision-making around retirement account access requires overcoming psychological barriers and applying rational analysis to long-term consequences. The guidance helps workers distinguish between reactive desperation and justified financial management.
content: Money coaches tell you how to move past the stigma and decide if tapping your retirement fund is rational or reactive.

zh.title: 考虑提取401(k)作为困难提取？先问自己这些问题
zh.summary: 财务顾问建议考虑提取401(k)的人仔细评估困难提取是否代表真正的财务需求或对困难的情感反应。围绕退休账户提取的战略决策需要克服心理障碍并对长期后果进行理性分析。这一建议帮助工人区分反应性绝望和合理的财务管理。

title: Get ready to work for 60 years — as living to 100 becomes the new norm
summary: Extended human lifespans to age 100 and beyond will fundamentally reshape workforce dynamics, requiring workers to remain employed for 60+ years rather than traditional 40-year careers. This demographic shift will necessitate changes to retirement savings strategies, workplace flexibility policies, and long-term financial planning. Society must adapt its economic and employment structures to accommodate dramatically longer working lives.
content: America’s older population is expected to expand in the coming years. That will change how we work, save and live.

zh.title: 准备好工作60年吧——活到100岁成为新常态
zh.summary: 人类寿命延长到100岁及以上将从根本上改变劳动力动态，要求工人保持60多年的工作而不是传统的40年职业生涯。这一人口转变将需要改变退休储蓄策略、工作场所灵活性政策和长期财务规划。社会必须适应其经济和就业结构，以适应明显更长的工作生活。

title: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Palantir, AMD, McDonald's, Broadcom, Airbnb & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major calls on several prominent companies including Nvidia, Apple, Palantir, and AMD on Monday, driving market attention across tech and consumer sectors.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Monday.

title: Private student loan market set to expand under new federal loan caps — with risks for grad school borrowers
summary: New federal student loan caps taking effect in July will push more borrowers toward private lenders, raising consumer protection concerns among advocacy groups about graduate student borrowing.
content: After new federal student loan limits go into effect in July, more borrowers will turn to private lenders. Consumer advocates say that comes with risks.

zh.summary: 7月生效的新联邦学生贷款上限将推动更多借款人转向私人贷款机构，引发倡导组织对研究生借款消费者保护的担忧。

title: The markets are in the early stages of pricing in stagflation. Here’s what happens next.
summary: Citigroup's quantitative analysts say financial markets are beginning to price in stagflation—a combination of stagnant economic growth and persistent inflation—with significant implications ahead.
content: Citi’s team of quantitative analysts have studied the market and say, it’s beginning to smell like stagflation.

zh.title: 市场正处于滞胀定价的早期阶段。接下来会发生什么。

title: Oil prices climb after disputed report of Iran strike on U.S. warship

title: 'Bubble effect': Weight loss drug fueled growth is putting the pharma sector at risk, report finds
summary: A Deloitte report warns the pharmaceutical industry faces risk from over-reliance on weight loss drugs, which now represent 25% of late-stage pipeline sales while oncology and other areas decline.
content: Obesity assets represent about 25% of total forecast sales of the late-stage pipeline, while oncology's share has slipped to 20%, Deloitte found.

zh.summary: 德勤报告警告制药行业面临对减肥药过度依赖的风险，这些药物现在代表晚期管道销售的25%，而肿瘤学和其他领域在下降。

content: Berkshire Hathaway has added to a giant pile of cash, and sending a message for investors to be patient.

content: More than 100 aircraft and 15,000 personnel will be part of the operation due to start on Monday, the US military says.

title: India is burning more coal as extreme heat and the Iran war squeeze energy supplies

content: The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations agency said Monday that a tanker was hit by projectiles north of the city of of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates.

zh.title: 油价波动上升，特朗普计划"解救"因中东冲突搁浅的船只
zh.summary: 一艘油轮在阿联酋富吉拉附近遭到炮击，加剧了地区紧张局势下油价波动。特朗普宣布"解救"搁浅船只可能影响能源市场稳定。该事件突显了对全球油气供应的持续破坏。

title: GameStop offers to buy eBay for $56bn
summary: GameStop has proposed acquiring eBay for $56 billion, with CEO Ryan Cohen expressing confidence in transforming it into a stronger Amazon competitor. The deal signals GameStop's expansion beyond gaming retail into broader e-commerce. The acquisition would represent major consolidation in the online marketplace sector.
content: GameStop's chief executive Ryan Cohen told the Wall Street Journal that he sees potential to make eBay a much bigger rival to Amazon.

zh.title: GameStop提议以560亿美元收购eBay
zh.summary: GameStop提议以560亿美元收购eBay，首席执行官瑞恩·科亨表示有信心将其转变为更强有力的亚马逊竞争对手。该交易表明GameStop正在从游戏零售扩展到更广泛的电子商务领域。这项收购将代表在线市场部门的重大整合。

title: Investors appear skeptical as Trump touts new plan to partially reopen Strait of Hormuz
summary: President Trump announced plans to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but investors remained skeptical about feasibility and implementation. Shipping has been stranded in the Persian Gulf due to the Iran conflict, disrupting global trade flows. Market hesitation reflects doubts about the proposal's effectiveness.
content: Investors appeared skeptical Sunday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. will work to “free” neutral shipping that’s been stranded in the Persian Gulf since the start of the war with Iran.

zh.title: 投资者表示怀疑，特朗普推介部分重开霍尔木兹海峡新计划
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布了重开霍尔木兹海峡的计划，但投资者对其可行性和实施情况持怀疑态度。由于伊朗冲突，船只在波斯湾搁浅，中断全球贸易流动。市场的犹豫反映了人们对该提议有效性的怀疑。

title: South Korean stocks hit fresh record, building on historic monthly rally in April
summary: South Korean stocks reached fresh record highs, extending a strong rally from April. Asian markets opened mixed as investors assessed Trump's Strait of Hormuz initiative and its economic implications. The performance reflects positive sentiment in the region despite broader uncertainties.
content: Asia markets were set to open mixed Monday as investors assess news of President Donald Trump's plan to "free" ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 韩国股市创新高，4月创历史性涨幅纪录
zh.summary: 韩国股市创历史新高，延续4月的强劲涨势。亚洲市场开盘涨跌不一，投资者评估特朗普的霍尔木兹海峡倡议及其经济影响。尽管存在更广泛的不确定性，该地区的表现反映了积极情绪。
